GeneDef.label: fleshshaper
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that are capable of rewriting and editing their owners' genetic code within certain limits. Carriers can freely change their xenotype and edit their genes to a limited extent, but their xenogermline are subject to constant decay.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Removes 1 random <color=#8a8ae6>xenogene</color> each day and provides <color=#8a8ae6>genetic material</color>.
If there are no <color=#8a8ae6>xenogenes</color>, then it gives <color=#8a8ae6>4 genetic material</color> and reduces xenogerm replication (<color=#8a8ae6>genes regrowing</color>) time by 5 days.
<color=#8a8ae6>Genetic material</color> can be used to implant unique genes, the list of which depends on endogenes.
